level.name: Field of Broken Dreams ( ground only )

modeDescriptions.mode_default: default mode is recommended for first time players.
modeDescriptions.mode_quick_cash: just like default mode, but with a much faster cash flow.
modeDescriptions.mode_2x: In this mode of play starting credits and cash flow are doubled, but so is the difficulty of your enemies.
modeDescriptions.mode_limit_10: In this mode of play you are limited to a maximum of 10 towers at once. Choose wisely!
modeDescriptions.mode_limit_20: In this mode of play you are limited to a maximum of 20 towers at once. Choose wisely!
modeDescriptions.mode_cash_5k: In this mode of play you start 5000 credits and initial enemies are tougher.
modeDescriptions.mode_20k_fixed: In this mode of play you start with 20000 credits, but will not earn more.
modeDescriptions.mode_50k_fixed: In this mode of play you start with 50000 credits, but will not earn more.
modeDescriptions.mode_100k_fixed: In this mode of play you start with 100000 credits, but will not earn more.
modeDescriptions.mode_quickPlay: In this mode of play enemy movement rates are doubled and hit points a halfed.

item.info: VULCAN CANNON - Features an increased rate of fire , range , and has a 10% chance of doing double damage. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
AUTO CANNON - Rate of fire is doubled, damage increased, and adds a 25% chance of doing double damage. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
LONG RANGE MISSILE TURRET - Drastically increased targeting range, 50% more damage, and a 25% chance of doing double damage. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
HEAVY ARTILLERY - 100% more damage, a 50% chance of doing double damage, and an increased area of effect. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
HEAVY FLAME THROWER - 100% increase in damage, a 5% chance to do double damage, and an increased area of effect. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
HEAVY LASER CANNON - 150% increase in damage and drastically increased range. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
AIR LASER - Converts your laser cannon into a long range anti-air weapon.
E.M.P LASER - 50% increase in damage and has a 75% slow effect for 3 seconds on each target hit. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
SHOCKWAVE EMITTER - 50% increased damage, increased range, and has a 25% slow effect for 5 seconds on each target hit. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
AIR PULSE EMITTER - 100% increased damage, increased range, and has a 50% slow effect for 5 seconds on each target hit. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
HEAVY FLAK CANNON - 50% extra damage per shot, 2 extra shots, and a 25% chance of doing double damage. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.
HEAVY PLASMA CANNON - 100% increase in damage, a 10% chance of doing double damage, and adds area effect damage to each shot. This item must be purchased from the upgrade shop.

standardBomb.info: BOMB (W) - A weapon of last resort for when your defenses fail.

EMP.info: E.M.P (E) - Slows enemy movement by 50% for all enemies within the target radius for 10 seconds.

nukeBomb.info: NUKE (R) - A bomb which effects a very large area and is very damaging, but also quite expensive. Damage is more intense closer to the center of the blast.

cannonTower.info: CANNON (2) - medium range turret capable of dealing significant damage to ground units.

bulletTower.info: MACHINE GUN (1) - A quick firing medium range turret capable of hitting air and ground units.

missileTower.info: MISSILE TURRET (3) - A long range turret which fires heat seeking surface to air missiles. If the missiles target is destroyed these missiles can acquire other near by targets.

PlasmaTower.info: PLASMA CANNON (9) - A powerful, but expensive, medium range turret capable of hitting air and ground units.

artilleryTower.info: ARTILLERY (8) - A slow firing but devastating long range cannon. Damage is more intense closer to the center of the blast.

laserTower.info: LASER CANNON (7) - A long range turret that will damage all units along the path of its beam. This turret can also be modified to target air units.

fireTower.info: FLAME THROWER (5) - A short range unit that fires a constant stream damaging all ground units in its path.

shockTower.info: PULSE EMITTER (6) - A slow firing but devastitating short range turret that damages all units within its radius. Damage is equal throughout the effected radius.

flakTower.info: FLAK CANNON (4) - A quick firing anti-air tower that shoots 5 simultaneous shots and has some area of effect damage.

block.info: WALL BLOCK (Q) - use these to limit the movement of the enemy forces.
